prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）最低位次约 5602→5489→7841→4929→5347，波动较大：2023 年因断档大幅后移至 7841 名，2024 年迅速回升至 4929 名，2025 年小幅后移至 5347 名；近两年呈先升后降走势，2025 年基准约 5347 名；本省理科（物理类）招生计划 2021–2025 年均为 12 人，2026 年计划增至 24 人，较 2025 年扩招 100%，大幅增加招生名额，竞争压力显著缓解，位次数字预期后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 辽宁大学为 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜 2026 年约第 125 名，近年排名稳定在 124–131 区间，属于中游偏上 211；该校在声誉文件中未出现明显负面舆情事件，2026 年声誉评价无数据；抖音热度排名第 105，评价为「一般」，短视频曝光量较低，报考关注度平稳；未见历史投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，应用经济学获评 A-，为该校唯一 A- 及以上学科；招生专业中的金融学类、审计学、国际经济与贸易等均属应用经济学相关方向，具有一定学科吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动 化等理科相关大类近年持续高热推荐，金融/财经/经济类呈分化观望；青海省 2021–2025 年理科（物理类）考生数约 3.0–3.3 万，2026 年总考生约 4.8 万（不确定），按历史比例估算理科约 3.07 万人，较 2025 年略有增加；辽宁大学位于辽宁省沈阳市，在青海省招生占比极小（university_enrollment_summary 中无青海省数据），属跨省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 5347 名、2026 年计划大幅扩招 100%（从 12 人增至 24 人）使竞争显著缓解、理科考生数略有增加但幅度远小于扩招比例、学校声誉平稳无负面舆情、应用经济学 A- 学科对相关专业有一定吸引力，预计 2026 年最低位次较 2025 年明显后移；预测最低位次约 8505 名，区间 8005–9005 名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间 8005–9005 名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（<8005 名）可重点冲刺电子信息类与金融学类；位次接近区间上限（>9005 名）应以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 5602→5489→7841→4929→5347, with significant fluctuations: in 2023, due to a gap, it dropped sharply to 7841; in 2024, it quickly rebounded to 4929; in 2025, it slightly moved back to 5347; in the past two years, it showed a trend of first rising then falling, with a baseline of about 5347 in 2025; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 12 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and in 2026, the plan increased to 24 students, a 100% expansion compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots, easing competition pressure, and the ranking number is expected to move backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 125th, with recent rankings stable in the 124–131 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the university has no obvious negative public opinion incidents in its reputation file, and there is no data for the 2026 reputation evaluation; Douyin popularity ranking is 105th, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure and stable application attention; no historical enrollment gap records; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; majors in the enrollment such as Finance, Auditing, and International Economics and Trade are all related to Applied Economics, having a certain disciplinary appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation and other science-related major categories have been consistently highly recommended in recent years, while Finance/Accounting/Economics categories show differentiation and wait-and-see; from 2021 to 2025, the number of science (physics category) examinees in Qinghai Province was about 30,000–33,000, and in 2026, the total examinees are about 48,000 (uncertain), estimated by historical proportion to be about 30,700 science examinees, a slight increase compared to 2025; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, with a very small enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province (no Qinghai data in university_enrollment_summary), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 5347, the 2026 plan's significant 100% expansion (from 12 to 24 students) greatly eases competition, a slight increase in science examinees but far less than the expansion ratio, stable school reputation with no negative public opinion, and the A- discipline of Applied Economics having some appeal for related majors, it is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will significantly move backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 8505, with a range of 8005–9005.

- Engineering Mechanics

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 8005–9005, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<8005), you can focus on aiming for Electronic Information and Finance majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>9005), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 819→863→729→797→884, fluctuating narrowly within the 729–884 range, with a 5-year average of about 818; the 2025 baseline is approximately 884, the highest ranking number in the past 5 years (easiest to enter); the provincial liberal arts (history category) enrollment plan was 8 students in 2021–2022, 10 students in 2023–2025, and increased to 20 students in 2026, a 100% expansion compared to 2025, significantly increasing enrollment slots, easing competition pressure, and expected to push the ranking number backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Liaoning University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks approximately 125th in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with recent rankings stable in the 124–131 range, placing it in the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; the university has no significant negative public opinion incidents in reputation documents, and there is no data for the 2026 reputation evaluation; it ranks 105th in Douyin popularity, rated as 'average', with low short video exposure and stable application attention; no historical record of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Applied Economics received an A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; although liberal arts enrollment majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and History do not directly correspond to A- disciplines, Liaoning University, as a comprehensive university, has a relatively strong overall humanities and social sciences strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In recent years, Law, Chinese Language/Chinese Literature and other liberal arts categories have been consistently recommended, Accounting/Finance/Auditing majors are recommended, and Teacher Training/Education categories are divided and wait-and-see; the number of liberal arts (history category) examinees in Qinghai Province from 2021 to 2025 was approximately 17,000–18,000, with a total of about 48,000 examinees in 2026 (uncertain), estimated by historical proportion to be about 17,300 liberal arts examinees, roughly the same as 2025; Liaoning University is located in Shenyang City, Liaoning Province, and its enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is extremely small (no Qinghai data in university_enrollment_summary), making it a cross-provincial enrollment with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 884, a significant 100% expansion in the 2026 plan (from 10 to 20 students) significantly easing competition, a roughly stable number of liberal arts examinees, and a stable school reputation with no negative public opinion, the minimum ranking in 2026 is expected to shift significantly backward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1384, with a range of 1038–1730.
